title: xylopicrum tenuifolium
intro: Xylopicrum tenuifolium, also known as the African star apple, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and serve as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant properties. Xylopicrum tenuifolium can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments in traditional medicine.
